landing.step1Desc: Choose Home, Draw or Away for every match of the matchday.
landing.step2Desc: Create a private league and share the link via WhatsApp.
landing.step3Desc: Earn a point for every correct prediction and climb the leaderboard.

about.title: About FC Quiniela
about.disclaimer: FC Quiniela is a free prediction game. We don't accept money. We're not a sportsbook.
about.whatDesc: FC Quiniela is a free platform where you can predict Liga MX matches every matchday, compete with friends and family in private leagues, and prove who knows Mexican soccer best. No betting, no hassle.

faqs.a: Every Liga MX matchday, you pick whether the home team wins (Home), it's a draw (Draw) or the away team wins (Away). You earn 1 point for each correct prediction.
Yes, FC Quiniela is 100% free. We don't accept money or any kind of betting.

faqs.q: Do I need to download an app?
faqs.a: No. FC Quiniela works directly in your browser. Just open the link and start playing.
Of course! FC Quiniela works anywhere in the world. You just need an internet connection.
After each matchday, your picks are compared against the actual Liga MX results. You earn 1 point per correct pick. The leaderboard updates automatically.
